name: TGI OpenAI Server
description: Registers a local TGI OpenAI-compatible server as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback loopback TGI OpenAI-compatible base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1.
Optional fallback bearer token for protected local TGI-compatible deployments when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional comma-separated TGI model IDs exposed by the local server when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: TGI base URL
settings.description: Loopback OpenAI-compatible base URL for TGI. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1 and is restricted by the plugin to localhost, 127.0.0.1, or ::1 /v1 URLs.

settings.label: TGI API token
settings.description: Optional bearer token for protected local TGI-compatible deployments. Falls back to TGI_API_KEY.

settings.label: TGI model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the local TGI server. Use IDs returned by TGI /v1/models or the loaded model ID. Falls back to comma-separated TGI_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: TGI OpenAI Server
providers.description: Registers configured local TGI OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
